channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Flexible work hours help law partner stay in her role at Clayton Utz
item.description: Eva Oraham, a rising partner at Clayton Utz, was facing burnout from the demanding 7am to 7pm office routine that threatened to derail her promising legal career. The intense workload and long office ...

item.title: RCB to take on LSG in a crucial IPL encounter
item.description: Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) are set to face Lucknow Super Giants (LSG) in a critical match that could influence playoff positions. While RCB has been performing strongly this season, LSG is stru...

item.title: Family Seeks Answers After Thika Man Detained in Abu Dhabi Without Clear Charges
item.description: A family from Kiganjo in Thika, Kiambu County, is going through a very stressful period after their son, Josephat Chege Kung’u, was arrested in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates, under circumstances tha...

item.title: Insights on the ongoing shift in wealth among corporations
item.description: The article highlights a significant economic trend described as the 'great wealth transfer' currently unfolding among businesses and investors. It discusses how corporate strategies, market shifts, a...

item.title: Three Evacuated from Cruise Ship Amid Rare Hantavirus Cases
item.description: Authorities have evacuated three people from the MV Hondius cruise ship, anchored off Cape Verde, after a hantavirus outbreak led to three deaths and several infections. The evacuated individuals incl...

item.title: CNN Founder Ted Turner Dies at 87, Leaves Global Media Legacy
item.description: Ted Turner, the charismatic American media entrepreneur who revolutionised news broadcasting, passed away at the age of 87. Turner, known for his moustache, love for yachting, and philanthropy, had be...

item.title: Canada lacks clear data on the number of temporary migrants remaining in the country
item.description: Canada is facing a significant challenge in tracking temporary migrants, as the federal government lacks reliable data on how many individuals remain in the country after their visas or permits expire...

item.title: Kakamega Authorities Ban Chaotic Funeral Processions to Ease Town Traffic
item.description: Kakamega county officials have officially banned disruptive funeral processions in the town centre due to the major traffic jams and public inconvenience they cause. Deputy County Commissioner Titus M...

item.title: Andrew Kibe Explains Why His Kiss FM Salary Was Quickly Spent
item.description: Media personality Andrew Kibe has opened up about how he used to spend his entire monthly salary of KSh 500,000 from Kiss FM in a single day. During an interview with musician Scar Mkadinali, Kibe exp...

item.title: Union Cabinet Approves Making Insults to Vande Mataram a Punishable Offence
item.description: The Union Cabinet, chaired by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, has approved an amendment to the 1971 Prevention of Insults to National Honour Act. The amendment aims to make any insult or obstruction to ...

item.title: Koskei Engages Gaming Industry on Ethics and Regulatory Stability
item.description: Nairobi — Chief of Staff and Head of the Public Service, Felix Koskei, recently held discussions with regulators and key players in Kenya’s gaming sector. The focus of the meeting was on promoting eth...

item.title: Kenya Relaunches Kazi Majuu Programme to Send 4,000 Workers to Gulf Region
item.description: The Kenyan government has officially relaunched the Kazi Majuu initiative, aiming to place over 4,000 Kenyans in jobs across four Gulf countries including Qatar, Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates, an...

item.title: Finance Minister Orders Johannesburg to Stop Unaffordable Wage Deal Amid Governance Concerns
item.description: Finance Minister Enoch Godongwana has instructed Johannesburg Mayor Dada Morero to immediately halt a R10.3 billion wage increase agreement with the South African Municipal Workers’ Union (Samwu), sta...

item.title: INEC chairman warns insecurity could undermine 2027 elections in Nigeria
item.description: Chairman of the Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC), Prof. Joash Amupitan, don raise serious concern say rising insecurity across Nigeria fit affect the conduct of free, fair and credible...

item.title: TikTok removes over 500,000 posts and thousands of livestreams related to Israel–Hamas war
item.description: TikTok has removed more than 500,000 videos related to the war between Israel and Hamas, along with shutting down approximately 8,000 livestreams that violated its community guidelines. The move comes...

item.title: 15th Puducherry Legislative Assembly Dissolved Following Lt. Governor's Orders
item.description: The 15th Puducherry Legislative Assembly has been officially dissolved as per the orders issued by Lieutenant Governor K Kailashnathan. According to a statement from the Legislative Assembly Secretari...

item.title: Kakamega Police Ban Reggae na Lami Concerts Due to Traffic and Public Safety Concerns
item.description: On Wednesday, May 6, 2026, Kakamega authorities officially banned the popular 'Reggae na Lami' funeral ritual following multiple complaints from motorists and local traders. The ritual, deeply rooted ...

item.title: Health officials urge vigilance after hepatitis A cases in Barry
item.description: Health authorities in Barry, Vale of Glamorgan, are advising parents to ensure children maintain thorough hand hygiene following a small outbreak of hepatitis A. The infection has been identified in t...

item.title: Coalition explores reducing annual net overseas migration to 150,000-200,000
item.description: The Coalition is considering a significant reduction in Australia's net overseas migration, with internal documents revealing plans to lower the annual figure to between 150,000 and 200,000. This repr...

item.title: Yanga SC ends contract with coach Pedro Gonçalves after seven months
item.description: Young Africans SC, better known as Yanga, have officially ended their working relationship with Portuguese coach Pedro Gonçalves after a seven-month tenure. Gonçalves joined the Tanzanian football gia...
